clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Quantify expected SBP reduction from lifestyle interventions and define medication initiation thresholds
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Treatment planning, shared decision-making, lifestyle counseling, medication initiation decisions
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Select appropriate intervention based on expected BP reduction + determine medication initiation threshold based on patient risk profile

navigationPath.purpose: Display lifestyle intervention options with SBP reduction ranges
Determine if patient has HTN or without HTN
Assess CVD, diabetes, CKD status and risk score
Display appropriate medication initiation threshold based on risk
Compare expected SBP reduction across interventions
Log intervention plan to health record

validationRules: If SBP ≥140 or DBP ≥90 → evaluate medication need
If clinical CVD present → lower threshold (≥130/80)
If low risk (<7.5%) → 3-6 months lifestyle trial before meds

rules: Determine patient HTN status (with HTN vs without HTN)
Select appropriate SBP reduction range based on HTN status for each intervention
Calculate expected total SBP reduction from combined interventions
Assess risk factors: clinical CVD, diabetes, CKD, ASCVD risk score
Apply medication initiation threshold based on risk profile
If low risk and BP remains ≥130/80 after 3-6 months of lifestyle changes → consider meds

medicationThresholds.threshold: BP remains ≥130/80 after 3-6 months of lifestyle changes

medicationThreshold.description: e.g., 'Start meds if SBP ≥140 or DBP ≥90'

loe.description: Level of Evidence (A, A/C-LD, or B-R)

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Initiate selected lifestyle interventions; reassess BP in 3-6 months
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: 3-6 months for low risk; 1 month for high risk or medication initiation
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Repeat BP at each follow-up to assess intervention effectiveness
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Notify care team if BP exceeds medication threshold or remains uncontrolled after 6 months
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log selected interventions, expected SBP reduction, and medication threshold to treatment plan
